summary: Tested 2 new features: (1) Booking sidebar login prompt for unauthenticated users, (2) Instagram button with Lottie popup on artist card. All core flows pass. One minor issue: Lottie animation fails to load due to CORS on external URL.

ui_bugs.component: Artist Card Instagram Popup - Lottie Animation
ui_bugs.issue: Lottie JSON fails to load due to CORS: 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header missing on https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/... The popup still opens, but the Lottie Instagram icon is NOT rendered (lottieData is null, so the animation div is conditionally skipped). Text @max.tattooist and link work correctly.

action_items: Fix CORS issue for Lottie JSON at https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_artist-connect-82/artifacts/qhhbpzlv_lottieflow-social-networks-15-5-000000-easey.json — either serve it through the backend proxy or host it in the public/ folder of the frontend to avoid CORS. Without this, the Lottie animation never renders.
critical_code_review_comments: Lottie JSON is fetched from external URL which has no CORS header set — lottieData will always be null in browser. Should be bundled locally or served through a CORS-enabled endpoint.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (4/4 core flows pass, Lottie animation not rendering)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9: Both new features (booking login prompt & Instagram button popup) work correctly. Login prompt shows for unauthenticated users with correct links (/login, /register). After login, booking form with calendar renders. Instagram popup appears/closes correctly. Only issue: Lottie animation not loading due to CORS on external asset URL. data-testids: booking-login-btn, booking-register-btn, ig-btn-artist_222473a35292, ig-popup-artist_222473a35292 all present and working.
